items.title: An essential framework to navigating technical challenges in contemporary OSD development
items.summary: Navigate key challenge in OSD development with an early risk-identification framework to improve bioavailability, stability, and scale-up with CDMO support.

items.title: Bayer looks to uphold Eylea legacy with $2.45bn Perfuse buyout
items.summary: If approved, Perfuse's PER-001 could continue Bayer’s ophthalmology legacy defined by blockbuster retinal disease therapy, Eylea.

items.title: Citius raises $36.5m for Lymphir commercialisation
items.summary: Citius Oncology has secured up to $36.5m to accelerate the commercialisation of Lymphir, a recombinant fusion protein immune therapy.

items.title: DDW 2026: key readouts from the conference
items.summary: Pharmaceutical Technology rounds up the key readouts from the 2026 Digestive Disease Week conference held in Chicago.

items.title: MSD concludes Terns acquisition to expand CML pipeline
items.summary: MSD has completed its acquisition of Terns Pharmaceuticals, expanding its pipeline of treatments for chronic myeloid leukaemia (CML).
